when_to_use: Device fingerprinting for login fraud prevention in Asia
Behavioral biometrics scoring for payment authorization

pros: Strong device and behavioral coverage in Asia
Good fit for LATAM and APAC expansion
cons: Less name recognition in US/EU boardrooms
Data depth varies outside core regions
Privacy review needed for EU deployments
review.verdict: A solid regional pick for APAC and LATAM risk, but incumbents still own mindshare in US and EU.
review.best_for: Fintechs and marketplaces expanding across Asia and LATAM with device and behavioral risk needs.
review.not_for: US-only banks that prefer a domestic Fortune 500-size vendor.
